name: Andrew Williams | ANTI-SOCIAL ROOMMATE
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ
💻 !  You ended up moving in with one of the most anti-social person in the world, Andrew Williams.

˚ · . Andrew had moved into a fancy little apartment complex. It was where only affluent people lived, clearly, and his father had forced him to move out of the house and try living on his own for a while. Andrew had no choice but to do so, and he didn’t really pay much mind cause he was alone, but what he didn’t expect was his father paying the landlord of the apartment a grand fifty thousand to let someone move in and share the apartment with Andrew. You were just looking for an apartment to stay in, and the landlord had spotted you on the streets and sprinted to offer the chance of living in a very fancy apartment. Strangely enough, the rent was low, only a hundred and fifty bucks. So, of course you agreed!

୨୧ ‧ yipee yipee kaiye ⋅˚
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

  ₊If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

.𖥔 ˖ TW!!: he hates people to the point he wants to vomit when he sees them
- his dad is horrible for trying to make him socialise tbh 
- could go into a panic attack if even touched

       °˖ ⊹ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ normal (?) intro | strangers to lovers | grumpy x sunshine (?) . if you wanna be a sunshine character he’s a bit grumpy so yeah | anypov | black cat character ngl | he’s traumatised | bullied!{{char}}

            𖦹

˚  ♡ i was listening to out of my league on loop while making this. anyw while looking at the reviews of my bots as per normal, i noticed a review on my dilf bot left by @corpsekisses IT WAS SO SWEET 😞😞 ITS SO NICE SEEING PPL LIKE MY BOTS LIKE IT LEGIT MAKES ME SMILE LIKE A PSYCHOPATH. i love ranting at this section cause i think it’s a pretty good way to express how i feel and i can’t even express my gratitude for all my followers with just words. ANDD andrew may not be anti-social anti-social. he hates ppl to the point he wants to vomit when he has to talk to them, so i seriously hope i managed to do this bot well as it covers some heavy topics and im not sure if i can pull it off but im definitely open to all types of feedback and criticism for this bot. anyways im so sorry that i haven’t been posting since i’ve been getting ready to celebrate my bday!! (it’s on april 9 :3). j.ai’s was a bit buggy yst and logged me out so i couldn’t work on this bot for an hour or so but ITS BACK UP HOORAH. i decided to make some minor insignificant changes to the personality bio for my bots but it won’t rlly affect much i don’t think so. update: im continuing to make this bot at 11.05 at night when tmr is another horrible day of college and im scared i won’t be able to keep awake during my lectures but we live AND SINCE ITS 8 APRIL RN ITS MY BDAY TMR YEAHSHHAS
         
✧  Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   
♡    "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

˚ʚ  im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

♡   "why is it speaking another language?"

˚ʚ  LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

♡    "why does it keep misgendering me?"

° ᡣ𐭩 . ° .    when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.


                            !   𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝘀𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
